goal: Promote MCP interoperability evidence from package-level artifacts into an explicit policy and promotion decision path.
successCriteria: Nightly and PR MCP evidence boundaries are explicit and machine-readable.
MCP interop promotion decisions can cite tracked evidence instead of transcript-only rationale.
Deferred MCP gaps remain explicit instead of being silently carried into later packages.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Adding new MCP transport families or broad Node platform features.
Promoting QiniuMCPServer in the same package.
